stories.title: The labs say AI has shifted the balance between cyber attack and defence
stories.summary: OpenAI launched Daybreak, a set of tools and an updated GPT-5.5-Cyber model meant to help defenders find and patch software flaws as fast as AI can now find them, calling cyber defence an inflection point. Anthropic's parallel research found attackers using AI deeper in the attack chain, letting less-skilled actors do damage that used to need real expertise. Most firms will not buy a tool like this, so the useful response is not a purchase but a process: assume the messages reaching your staff are cleaner and more convincing than before, and confirm anything that moves money or data through a second channel.
